articles.title: Police seize dog who severely injured smaller pup in Chelsea attack caught on video
articles.description:
“Many members of our department are dog owners themselves and recognize the pain and trauma experienced by the victim and family,” Chelsea’s police chief said.

The post Police seize dog who severely injured smaller pup in Chelsea attack caught on video appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Police seized a dog involved in a severe attack on a smaller pup in Chelsea.
The incident was captured on video, prompting a swift police response.
Chelsea's police chief emphasized the emotional trauma experienced by the victim's family.

articles.title: Mac Jones opens up about his tumultuous time with the Patriots
articles.description:

summary: Mac Jones discusses challenges faced during his time with the Patriots.

articles.title: Red Sox pitcher Ranger Suarez ruled out for All-Star Game because of groin injury
articles.description:

His absence may affect the Red Sox's pitching strategy and fan engagement during the All-Star festivities.
